text:
Created attachment 147154
/usr/local/include/thrift/cxxfunctional.h:93:18: error: no member named 'bind' in namespace 'std'\

Hi! I try to install scribe on FreeBSD 10.0-RELEASE-p7,but always show below message

/usr/local/include/thrift/cxxfunctional.h:93:18: error: no member named 'bind' in namespace 'std'
    using ::std::bind;
          ~~~~~~~^
you can see detail in attacchment file.
